mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in nonfarm payrolls indicates expanding labor income and consumption capacity, which drives corporate revenue growth and produces positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Positive directional accuracy falls below 55% over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns following month-over-month PAYEMS increases are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A federal funds rate above 5.0 percent signals restrictive monetary policy that elevates discount rates and debt-service costs, compressing equity valuations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns are positive in more than 50% of months when FEDFUNDS exceeds 5.0%, or the mean return in triggered periods is not significantly negative versus baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent month-over-month increases in the unemployment rate and decreases in nonfarm payrolls confirm labor market deterioration, reducing household income expectations and corporate earnings forecasts, which drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises month-over-month and PAYEMS falls month-over-month
failure_condition: The joint signal of rising UNRATE and falling PAYEMS fails to predict negative 20-day returns in more than 60% of triggered instances, or the interaction term adds no incremental explanatory power (F-test p > 0.05) over single-series models.

mechanism_narrative: During late-cycle expansions, two consecutive quarters of decelerating real GDP growth signal diminishing demand momentum and impending earnings downgrades, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 growth decelerates for two consecutive quarters
failure_condition: Negative directional accuracy falls below 55% over any 3-year rolling window during late-cycle regimes, or 60-day forward returns following consecutive GDP deceleration are not significantly negative (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Rising advance retail sales reflect robust consumer spending that directly lifts corporate top-line revenues, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Positive directional accuracy falls below 55% over any 2-year rolling window, or 5-day forward returns following month-over-month RSAFS increases are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month contraction in industrial production indicates weakening manufacturing output and capacity utilization, which reduces aggregate supply-side profitability and produces negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns are positive in more than 50% of months when INDPRO contracts month-over-month, or the mean return in triggered periods is not significantly negative versus baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts below 1500 thousand units signal a cooling residential construction sector and weakening construction employment, which reduces aggregate demand and produces negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns are positive in more than 50% of months when HOUST is below 1500, or the mean return in triggered periods is not significantly negative versus baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: The combination of a federal funds rate above 5.0 percent and an unemployment rate below 5.0 percent indicates restrictive monetary policy operating against a tight labor market, raising the probability of a hard landing and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint condition of FEDFUNDS > 5.0 and UNRATE < 5.0 fails to predict negative 20-day returns in more than 60% of triggered instances, or the interaction term adds no incremental explanatory power (F-test p > 0.05) over single-series models.
